products.name: GALXYL® Dimer Raw Material
products.descriptor: GALXYL® parylene dimer raw material distributed exclusively in North America for conformal coating

evidence.snippet:
INTRODUCING **DIMER RAW MATERIAL**
As of January 1, 2022 Advanced Coating is the new exclusive distributor for GALXYL® dimer in North America.  With the addition of raw materials to our Parylene offerings, we now provide a broader selection of high-quality Parylene coating solutions.

products.name: Parylene N
products.descriptor: Unsubstituted parylene polymer variant for conformal coating with high dielectric strength

evidence.snippet: Terms and Conditions for Dimer Sales

products.name: Parylene Conformal Coating Services
products.descriptor: Contract parylene conformal coating services for electronics, military, and medical assemblies

evidence.snippet:
Parylene Conformal Coating Services
===================================
**Outsource with Confidence**
-----------------------------
Advanced Coating has established a reputation for providing the highest quality Parylene conformal coating services in the industry and specializes in contract services for military, avionics, industrial applications, high risk electronics, and medical devices.

*   FAR/DFAR – Federal Acquisition Regulation/Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation
*   ITAR Registered (International Trade in Arms Regulations)

products.notes: ITAR registered; IPC-CC-830 and MIL-I-46058C certified; AS9100 Rev D; FAR/DFAR compliant. No NDAA Section 848/889 claim found.

products.name: GALXYL® Dimer C (GPDC-01)
products.descriptor: 1 lb Parylene C dimer raw material for conformal coating deposition
products.notes: MIL-I-46058C and IPC-CC-830 approved. USP XXII Class VI biocompatibility rating. Part # GPDC-01, 1 lb package.

products.name: GALXYL® Dimer N (GPDN-05)
products.descriptor: 5 lb Parylene N dimer raw material for conformal coating deposition
products.notes: USP XXII Class VI biocompatibility rating. Part # GPDN-05, 5 lb package. Large volume and custom packaging options available.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance is not mentioned anywhere in the corpus for any product; certifications page lists ITAR, FAR/DFAR, IPC-CC-830, and AS9100 but not NDAA.

The GPDN-05 listing on the raw material page shows '5lbs' but the page notes large volume and custom packaging are also available — exact SKU boundaries for other sizes are not disclosed in the corpus.
